sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113801" key="*xe/rnasos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Χέρνᾱσος</orth>, prob. <sense id="n113801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Χερρόνησος, Χερσόνησος, ἐγ Χερνάσοις</ref> </xr> <hi rend="ital" TEIform="hi">Docum. <*>nt. dell' Africa Italiana</hi> ii <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cirenaica</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
